parks.title: Solar parks
parks.noParks: No solar parks. Create one linked to a parcel.
parks.noParcels: No parcels. Create a parcel on the map first.
parks.noTrackersInPark: No trackers on this parcel. Add trackers with refAgriParcel to this parcel.

panel.title: Instant values
panel.selectTracker: Select a tracker to see live values

manual.title: Manual controls
manual.confirmStow: Confirm stow position? Tracker will move to -60° (stow position).
manual.confirmTrack: Confirm sun tracking? Tracker will move to 0° tilt, 180° azimuth.

algorithms.title: Orientation algorithm
algorithms.description: Choose the preset that defines how tilt and azimuth are computed.
algorithms.customDescription: A custom algorithm or manual override is currently active.

algorithmDescriptions.maximize: Maximizes solar capture. Panels flat when sunny, stowed when dark.
algorithmDescriptions.hierarchical_failsafe: Multi-condition safety cascade: wind → stress → generation → stow.
algorithmDescriptions.thermal_stress: Reduces cell temperature by angling panels at 70° when T > 35°C.
algorithmDescriptions.wind_barrier: Wind protection mode. Panels steep at 75° when wind > 15 m/s.
algorithmDescriptions.frost_prevention: Prevents frost damage. Panels flat when leaf temperature ≤ 2°C.
algorithmDescriptions.hydric_stress: Water stress mitigation. Shades crops when stress index > 0.8.
algorithmDescriptions.par_optimization: Optimizes light for understory crops. Adjusts based on PAR levels.

signals.title: Configure signals
signals.description: Assign a platform entity and attribute to each algorithm variable.
signals.noSources: No sources available. Register sensors in the platform.
signals.configureHint: Configure signals to see sensor values.
